rationale: The citing paper’s data description (February 1990 automobile mail survey, 901 respondents/870 used) closely overlaps the cited paper’s pre-Internet survey wave (1990 survey of 1989 buyers, 901 usable responses from the same Buffalo-area frame), suggesting the cited article may be a key data-source or contextual foundation.
